---
title: "Lecture 18: Form Validation"
subtitle: "{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}"
author: "{{< meta instructor.name >}}"
date: "February 24, 2026"
code-annotations: below
---


## {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="custom-title">
[Lecture 18]{.baby-blue-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Form Validation]{.white-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Week 5 | Unit II: DOM Manipulation<br>
{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}<br>
{{< meta instructor.name >}}, {{< meta instructor.title >}}
</div>

---

## {data-menu-title="Learning Objectives"}

[Learning Objectives]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Validate user input with HTML5 attributes
- Implement client-side validation with JavaScript
- Use regular expressions for pattern matching
- Provide real-time validation feedback
- Prevent form submission with invalid data
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Why Validation"}

[Why Validate Forms?]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Ensure correct data format
- Improve user experience with instant feedback
- Prevent invalid data from reaching server
- Reduce errors and security risks
- Guide users to complete forms correctly
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="HTML5 Validation"}

[HTML5 Built-in Validation]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4"}
<input type="email" required>
<input type="number" min="1" max="100">
<input type="text" pattern="[A-Za-z]+" placeholder="Letters only">
<input type="url" placeholder="https://example.com">
```

::: {.body-text-m}
Browsers provide automatic validation for these types.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Required Fields"}

[Required Fields]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4"}
<form>
  <input type="text" name="username" required>
  <input type="email" name="email" required>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>
```

The `required` attribute prevents submission if field is empty.

---

## {data-menu-title="Pattern Matching"}

[Pattern Attribute]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3"}
<input type="text" pattern="[0-9]{10}" 
       placeholder="10-digit phone"
       title="Enter exactly 10 digits">
```

::: {.body-text-m}
- `pattern` uses regular expressions
- `title` shows hint on validation failure
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="JS Validation Basics"}

[JavaScript Validation: Basics]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|3-6|4|5"}
const form = document.querySelector('form');

form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  validateForm();
});
```

`preventDefault()` stops form submission until validation passes.

---

## {data-menu-title="Validate Function"}

[Validation Function]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3-5|6-8|9"}
function validateForm() {
  const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
  if (email === '') {
    alert('Email is required');
    return false;
  }
  if (!isValidEmail(email)) {
    alert('Enter valid email');
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Email Regex"}

[Email Validation with Regex]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3"}
function isValidEmail(email) {
  const regex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  return regex.test(email);
}
```

::: {.body-text-m}
- `^` start of string
- `[^\s@]+` one or more non-space, non-@ chars
- `@` literal @
- `\.` literal dot
- `$` end of string
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Phone Regex"}

[Phone Number Validation]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3"}
function isValidPhone(phone) {
  const regex = /^[0-9]{10}$/;
  return regex.test(phone);
}
```

::: {.body-text-m}
This pattern requires exactly 10 digits.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Real-time Validation"}

[Real-time Validation]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|3-9|5-6|7-8"}
const emailInput = document.getElementById('email');

emailInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
  const isValid = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(this.value);
  if (!isValid) {
    this.style.borderColor = 'red';
  } else {
    this.style.borderColor = 'green';
  }
});
```

`blur` event fires when user leaves the input field.

---

## {data-menu-title="Display Errors"}

[Displaying Error Messages]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2-5|6-9"}
const errorDiv = document.querySelector('.error-message');
if (!isValid) {
  errorDiv.textContent = 'Invalid email format';
  errorDiv.style.display = 'block';
}
else {
  errorDiv.textContent = '';
  errorDiv.style.display = 'none';
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Password Match"}

[Password Matching]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4-6|7"}
function validatePassword() {
  const pwd = document.getElementById('password').value;
  const confirm = document.getElementById('confirm-password').value;
  if (pwd !== confirm) {
    alert('Passwords do not match');
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Length Check"}

[Password Length Check]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2-4|5"}
function checkPasswordStrength(pwd) {
  if (pwd.length < 8) {
    return 'Password must be at least 8 characters';
  }
  return 'Valid';
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="classList for Errors"}

[Using classList for Error States]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|2-4|5-7"}
const input = document.getElementById('username');
if (!isValid) {
  input.classList.add('error');
  input.classList.remove('success');
} else {
  input.classList.add('success');
  input.classList.remove('error');
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Complete Example"}

[Complete Validation Example]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

```{.javascript code-line-numbers="|1|3-11|13-17"}
const form = document.querySelector('#signup-form');

form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
  const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value;
  
  if (isValidEmail(email) && isValidPhone(phone)) {
    alert('Form submitted successfully!');
  } else {
    alert('Please fix errors');
  }
});

function isValidEmail(email) {
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email);
}
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Best Practices"}

[Best Practices]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Validate on both client and server
- Provide clear error messages
- Highlight invalid fields visually
- Use HTML5 validation when possible
- Test with edge cases (empty, special chars)
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Practice"}

[Practice Task]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
Create a registration form with:

1. Email validation
2. Phone number (10 digits)
3. Password matching
4. Display error messages in red
5. Prevent submission until all valid
:::

---

## {#end-slide data-menu-title="End Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="page-center">
<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Questions?]{.white-text}
</div>
<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Next: Lecture 19 - ES6+ Features
</div>
</div>
